proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is associated with longer pfs_months (positive correlation between continuous age and PFS).

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS=4.31 months (SD 2.29); Pearson r between age_years and pfs_months = 0.766 (p<1e-300). PFS rises strongly with age in this cohort.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Female patients (sex_female=1) have different mean pfs_months than male patients.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS in females=4.308 vs males=4.314 (diff=-0.006 months, t-test p=0.7703). No detectable sex difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: stage_iv=1 patients have shorter pfs_months than stage_iv=0 patients.
Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Stage IV mean PFS=3.703 vs non-stage IV=5.055 (diff=-1.352 months, p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: right_sided_primary=1 patients have shorter pfs_months than left-sided patients (right_sided_primary=0).

analyses.result_summary: Right-sided mean PFS=4.114 vs left-sided=4.419 (diff=-0.305 months, p=1.04e-49).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with kras_mutation=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with kras_mutation=0.
Patients with nras_mutation=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with nras_mutation=0.
Patients with braf_v600e=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with braf_v600e=0.
Patients with msi_high=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with msi_high=0.
Patients with her2_amplified=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with her2_amplified=0.
Patients with ntrk_fusion=1 have different mean pfs_months than those with ntrk_fusion=0.

analyses.result_summary: kras_mutation: mean PFS in mutant=4.121 (n=20898) vs wild-type=4.448 (n=29102); diff=-0.327 months, p=1.86e-58.
nras_mutation: mean PFS in mutant=4.526 (n=1506) vs wild-type=4.305 (n=48494); diff=+0.221 months, p=0.0007312.
braf_v600e: mean PFS in mutant=4.094 (n=2272) vs wild-type=4.322 (n=47728); diff=-0.228 months, p=3.47e-07.
msi_high: mean PFS in mutant=4.293 (n=2513) vs wild-type=4.313 (n=47487); diff=-0.019 months, p=0.6803.
her2_amplified: mean PFS in mutant=4.258 (n=1504) vs wild-type=4.313 (n=48496); diff=-0.056 months, p=0.3603.
ntrk_fusion: mean PFS in mutant=4.351 (n=251) vs wild-type=4.311 (n=49749); diff=+0.040 months, p=0.7862.

proposed_hypotheses.text: cea_ng_ml is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
albumin_g_dl is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
ldh_u_l is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
weight_loss_pct_6mo is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
crp_mg_l is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
nlr is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
hemoglobin_g_dl is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
ast_u_l is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
alt_u_l is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
total_bilirubin_mg_dl is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
creatinine_mg_dl is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
bun_mg_dl is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
sodium_meq_l is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
potassium_meq_l is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).
calcium_mg_dl is correlated with pfs_months (any direction).

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r(cea_ng_ml, pfs_months) = -0.0377 (p=3.13e-17).
Pearson r(albumin_g_dl, pfs_months) = +0.1018 (p=3.25e-115).
Pearson r(ldh_u_l, pfs_months) = -0.0112 (p=0.01256).
Pearson r(weight_loss_pct_6mo, pfs_months) = -0.1229 (p=2.21e-167).
Pearson r(crp_mg_l, pfs_months) = -0.0083 (p=0.06496).
Pearson r(nlr, pfs_months) = +0.0047 (p=0.2896).
Pearson r(hemoglobin_g_dl, pfs_months) = -0.0079 (p=0.07769).
Pearson r(alkaline_phosphatase_u_l, pfs_months) = -0.0128 (p=0.004135).
Pearson r(ast_u_l, pfs_months) = +0.0044 (p=0.3222).
Pearson r(alt_u_l, pfs_months) = -0.0042 (p=0.3523).
Pearson r(total_bilirubin_mg_dl, pfs_months) = -0.0090 (p=0.04404).
Pearson r(creatinine_mg_dl, pfs_months) = -0.0059 (p=0.1843).
Pearson r(bun_mg_dl, pfs_months) = -0.0043 (p=0.3348).
Pearson r(sodium_meq_l, pfs_months) = -0.0007 (p=0.8712).
Pearson r(potassium_meq_l, pfs_months) = +0.0086 (p=0.05518).
Pearson r(calcium_mg_dl, pfs_months) = -0.0072 (p=0.1059).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_cetuximab=1 have different mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_cetuximab.
Patients receiving treatment_bevacizumab=1 have different mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_bevacizumab.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab=1 have different mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.
Patients receiving treatment_encorafenib=1 have different mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_encorafenib.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 have different mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib.
Patients receiving treatment_regorafenib=1 have different mean pfs_months than those not receiving treatment_regorafenib.

analyses.result_summary: treatment_cetuximab: treated mean PFS=4.285 (n=15078) vs untreated=4.323 (n=34922); diff=-0.038 months, p=0.08801.
treatment_bevacizumab: treated mean PFS=4.301 (n=22383) vs untreated=4.320 (n=27617); diff=-0.019 months, p=0.3544.
treatment_pembrolizumab: treated mean PFS=4.316 (n=7660) vs untreated=4.311 (n=42340); diff=+0.005 months, p=0.8557.
treatment_encorafenib: treated mean PFS=4.316 (n=5111) vs untreated=4.311 (n=44889); diff=+0.005 months, p=0.8725.
treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib: treated mean PFS=4.271 (n=4033) vs untreated=4.315 (n=45967); diff=-0.044 months, p=0.2435.
treatment_regorafenib: treated mean PFS=5.089 (n=10022) vs untreated=4.117 (n=39978); diff=+0.972 months, p=1.71e-216.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for all features simultaneously (OLS), age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, right_sided_primary, kras_mutation, braf_v600e, albumin_g_dl, weight_loss_pct_6mo, cea_ng_ml, ldh_u_l and treatment_regorafenib remain independently associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ all features. age_years: coef=+0.1758 (p<1e-300); ecog_ps: coef=-1.1712 (p<1e-300); stage_iv: coef=-1.3616 (p<1e-300); right_sided_primary: coef=-0.2867 (p=8.84e-273); kras_mutation: coef=-0.3542 (p<1e-300); braf_v600e: coef=-0.3565 (p=3.96e-79); albumin_g_dl: coef=+0.4692 (p<1e-300); weight_loss_pct_6mo: coef=-0.0761 (p<1e-300); cea_ng_ml: coef=-0.0050 (p=2.00e-97); ldh_u_l: coef=-0.0004 (p=6.90e-19); treatment_regorafenib: coef=+0.9431 (p<1e-300); treatment_cetuximab: coef=-0.0110 (p=0.19); treatment_pembrolizumab: coef=+0.0003 (p=0.9782); treatment_encorafenib: coef=+0.0061 (p=0.6331); treatment_bevacizumab: coef=+0.0026 (p=0.7335); treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib: coef=+0.0258 (p=0.06909)

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_cetuximab improves pfs_months in patients with KRAS wild-type, NRAS wild-type, BRAF wild-type tumors (i.e., kras_mutation=0 AND nras_mutation=0 AND braf_v600e=0).
treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months in msi_high=1 patients.
treatment_encorafenib improves pfs_months in braf_v600e=1 patients.
treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib improves pfs_months in her2_amplified=1 patients.

analyses.result_summary: cetux_in_RASwt_BRAFwt: n=25324 (treated=7691); coef=-0.045 (p=0.1735); mean treated=4.4437012258250395 vs untreated=4.489134253661402
pembro_in_MSI_high: n=2513 (treated=396); coef=+0.007 (p=0.9548); mean treated=4.299318683711314 vs untreated=4.292246634161255
encora_in_BRAFmut: n=2272 (treated=242); coef=-0.129 (p=0.3594); mean treated=3.9790352857001765 vs untreated=4.107822995867288
trastu_in_HER2pos: n=1504 (treated=120); coef=+0.017 (p=0.9388); mean treated=4.273294511423771 vs untreated=4.256311187742712

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_cetuximab improves pfs_months specifically in RAS/BRAF wild-type, left-sided tumors (kras=0, nras=0, braf_v600e=0, right_sided_primary=0).
treatment_cetuximab is harmful or neutral in kras_mutation=1 patients.
treatment_pembrolizumab is neutral or harmful in msi_high=0 patients.

After adjusting for clinical covariates, the canonical targeted-therapy associations (cetuximab in RAS-WT, pembrolizumab in MSI-high, encorafenib in BRAF V600E, trastuzumab/tucatinib in HER2+) remain non-significant.

analyses.result_summary: cetux_in_RASwt_BRAFwt_LEFT: n=16443 (treated=5067); coef=-0.067 (p=0.1285); mean treated=4.6169733966397475 vs untreated=4.68372047508135
cetux_in_KRASmut: n=20898 (treated=6257); coef=-0.028 (p=0.3758); mean treated=4.101865578137388 vs untreated=4.129784849068101
pembro_in_MSS: n=47487 (treated=7264); coef=+0.005 (p=0.861); mean treated=4.316922753298863 vs untreated=4.311803865786746

Adjusted (covariate-controlled) subgroup analyses: cetuximab RAS-WT/BRAF-WT coef=-0.017 (p=0.3291); cetuximab RAS-WT/BRAF-WT/LEFT coef=-0.031 (p=0.2461); pembrolizumab MSI-high coef=+0.044 (p=0.4199); encorafenib BRAF coef=-0.020 (p=0.4057); trastuzumab/tucatinib HER2+ coef=+0.006 (p=0.953)

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_bevacizumab has no effect on pfs_months in the overall cohort.
treatment_bevacizumab has no effect on pfs_months in left-sided tumors.
treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib improves pfs_months in HER2+, RAS/BRAF wild-type tumors (her2_amplified=1, kras=0, nras=0, braf_v600e=0).

analyses.result_summary: bev_in_left_sided: n=32343 (treated=14517); coef=-0.012 (p=0.6469); mean treated=4.412647899121763 vs untreated=4.42490103080278
trastu_HER2_RASwt_BRAFwt: n=761 (treated=59); coef=+0.014 (p=0.9665); mean treated=4.454426281346242 vs untreated=4.440094560291846

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_regorafenib increases pfs_months versus no regorafenib in the overall cohort.

analyses.result_summary: rego_overall: n=50000 (treated=10022); coef=+0.972 (p<1e-300); mean treated=5.088922220206073 vs untreated=4.116760508426309

proposed_hypotheses.text: An exhaustive treatment-by-biomarker interaction screen will reveal that treatment_regorafenib has highly significant interactions with kras_mutation, braf_v600e, and right_sided_primary (its benefit is modified by these features), while other treatments will lack strong interactions.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction screen pfs ~ tx*biomarker for all 6 treatments x 9 biomarkers. Significant: treatment_bevacizumab__x__braf_v600e: inter_coef=-0.228 (p=0.02218); treatment_pembrolizumab__x__right_sided_primary: inter_coef=-0.116 (p=0.04985); treatment_regorafenib__x__kras_mutation: inter_coef=-1.629 (p=7.69e-226); treatment_regorafenib__x__nras_mutation: inter_coef=+0.988 (p=1.20e-11); treatment_regorafenib__x__braf_v600e: inter_coef=-1.183 (p=6.13e-23); treatment_regorafenib__x__right_sided_primary: inter_coef=-1.454 (p=4.08e-168)

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_regorafenib increases pfs_months in kras_mutation=0 patients, but not in kras_mutation=1 patients.
treatment_regorafenib increases pfs_months in left-sided (right_sided_primary=0) patients, but not in right-sided patients.
treatment_regorafenib increases pfs_months in braf_v600e=0 patients, but not in braf_v600e=1 patients.
The treatment_regorafenib benefit on pfs_months is abolished in the highest tertile of cea_ng_ml.

analyses.result_summary: Tertiles of CEA: low: coef=+1.784 (p<1e-300); mid: coef=+1.104 (p=2.87e-137); high: coef=+0.007 (p=0.8666)

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_bevacizumab harms pfs_months in braf_v600e=1 patients (i.e., negative effect in this subgroup).
treatment_bevacizumab has no significant effect on pfs_months in any of the major clinical subgroups (sidedness, KRAS status, MSI, HER2, sex, stage).

analyses.result_summary: Bev subgroup sweep – non-significant subgroups: right_sided_primary=0: coef=-0.012 (p=0.6469); right_sided_primary=1: coef=-0.034 (p=0.2763); stage_iv=0: coef=-0.015 (p=0.6139); stage_iv=1: coef=-0.019 (p=0.4823); kras_mutation=0: coef=-0.015 (p=0.5879); kras_mutation=1: coef=-0.020 (p=0.4925); nras_mutation=0: coef=-0.021 (p=0.3136); nras_mutation=1: coef=+0.063 (p=0.6313); braf_v600e=0: coef=-0.010 (p=0.6453); msi_high=0: coef=-0.024 (p=0.263); msi_high=1: coef=+0.068 (p=0.46); her2_amplified=0: coef=-0.023 (p=0.2698); her2_amplified=1: coef=+0.109 (p=0.3648); ntrk_fusion=0: coef=-0.018 (p=0.3716); ntrk_fusion=1: coef=-0.143 (p=0.6297); sex_female=0: coef=-0.012 (p=0.6601); sex_female=1: coef=-0.028 (p=0.3708)

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_regorafenib increases pfs_months in patients who are kras_mutation=0, nras_mutation=0, braf_v600e=0, AND right_sided_primary=0 (the joint RAS/BRAF-WT, left-sided subgroup), with a larger effect than in either single-modifier subgroup.
treatment_regorafenib improves pfs_months in left-sided (right_sided_primary=0) patients regardless of mutation status.

analyses.result_summary: rego_RASwt_BRAFwt_LEFT: n=16443 (treated=3264); coef=+2.749 (p<1e-300); mean treated=6.866446530522558 vs untreated=4.117469219946386
rego_LEFT_only: n=32343 (treated=6524); coef=+1.480 (p<1e-300); mean treated=5.600577467687518 vs untreated=4.1209391505266515

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_regorafenib increases pfs_months most strongly in kras_mutation=0, nras_mutation=0, braf_v600e=0, right_sided_primary=0, low-CEA (cea_ng_ml below median) patients.
Within the RAS/BRAF-WT, left-sided subgroup, the treatment_regorafenib effect is much smaller in patients with cea_ng_ml in the highest tertile than in those with low/medium cea_ng_ml.

analyses.result_summary: rego_RASwt_BRAFwt_LEFT_CEAlow: n=8202 (treated=1681); coef=+5.020 (p<1e-300); mean treated=9.10551624800023 vs untreated=4.085248509870995
CEA non-high tertile within RAS-WT/BRAF-WT/LEFT: coef=+4.030 (p<1e-300); CEA high tertile within same subgroup: coef=-0.007 (p=0.9241).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The treatment_regorafenib effect on pfs_months is abolished if EITHER kras_mutation=1 OR right_sided_primary=1; the effect is restored only when both are zero. Tested as a three-way interaction treatment_regorafenib × kras_mutation × right_sided_primary, where the three-way coefficient is positive (indicating that 'KRAS+ AND right-sided' brings the rego effect back to zero rather than further negative).

analyses.result_summary: Three-way model coefficients: treatment_regorafenib (KRAS WT, left)=+2.502; × kras_mutation = -2.510; × right_sided_primary = -2.494; × kras × right = +2.506 (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a joint multivariable model with covariate adjustment and interactions of treatment_regorafenib with kras_mutation, braf_v600e, right_sided_primary, and continuous cea_ng_ml, all four interaction terms remain negative and highly significant, confirming that each independently attenuates the regorafenib benefit.

analyses.result_summary: Joint model: rego main coef (KRAS-WT, BRAF-WT, left, CEA=0) = +2.495 (p<1e-300). Modifier interactions: treatment_regorafenib:kras_mutation: coef=-1.7638 (p<1e-300); treatment_regorafenib:braf_v600e: coef=-1.7596 (p<1e-300); treatment_regorafenib:right_sided_primary: coef=-1.4505 (p<1e-300); treatment_regorafenib:cea_ng_ml: coef=-0.0246 (p<1e-300)

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_regorafenib increases pfs_months in the subgroup defined by kras_mutation=0 AND braf_v600e=0 AND right_sided_primary=0 AND cea_ng_ml below the upper tertile (~14.5 ng/mL); the unfavorable values of any of these four features (KRAS mutation, BRAF V600E, right-sided primary, or high CEA) suppress the benefit. This is the best-supported treatment-effect subgroup for the regorafenib–pfs_months pair.

The regorafenib benefit in the kras=0 AND braf=0 AND right_sided_primary=0 AND CEA-non-high subgroup remains large and significant after adjusting for age_years, sex_female, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, nlr, crp_mg_l, hemoglobin_g_dl.

treatment_cetuximab does NOT improve pfs_months in the same kras=0, braf=0, right_sided_primary=0, CEA-non-high subgroup, confirming that the regorafenib benefit is treatment-specific rather than an artifact of patient selection.

analyses.result_summary: rego_FINAL_KRASwt_BRAFwt_LEFT_CEAnonhigh: n=11610 (treated=2366); coef=+4.042 (p<1e-300); mean treated=8.135032840405577 vs untreated=4.092539928957829
Adjusted OLS in same subgroup (n=11610): treatment_regorafenib coef = +3.990 (p<1e-300).
cetux_RASwt_BRAFwt_LEFT_CEAnonhigh: n=10996 (treated=3379); coef=-0.101 (p=0.08166); mean treated=4.840510121385898 vs untreated=4.94102047816732
